textByHashes.a7ce722a7b0415f30c025e1b6ebe5fd6359978d7: Oh, hello stranger. If you're new to town you should speak with our ruler, King Gjuki Sorvott IV. He'll want to meet you - he always wants to have a chat with any strangers in town. They could be spies you know.
textByHashes.8bc9f4013b14de330ade7bc419ece24337f7d2b4: Yes, spies from Neitiznot. They're everywhere. Apparently. That's what the King says anyway.
textByHashes.8c8b3177c491459a4474dcc930ead58c7b5b6005: Me? I'm a cook. Fish dishes a speciality. I hate fish. But fish is about all we have. Except for yak. But we're not allowed to eat yak.
textByHashes.9cf2bc15cb97d36ddb15d3fcc4a59b68f53852d1: Certainly not! Yak meat is both sweet and delicately flavoured. Yak is juicier than buffalo and elk - but never gamey. It goes wonderfully well with a glass of red wine, and it's healthy too!
textByHashes.e1ce8309c9bd3327bba8c11029d25fefab2ace17: King's orders. They breed and eat yaks on Neitiznot, so WE'RE not allowed to. It's unjust I tell you! I had a dream last night about a juicy fillet of yak, served on a bed of deep-fried seaweed and topped with a garnish
textByHashes.64bc73db9cfd21ee3e5de391e364554e6b12a1ee: No. It would only be fish anyway. Why would you want to eat fish?
textByHashes.71b900f0becaabf6c6d047aaa82ca0c4fce9d544: If you insist. Sorry the stock is so low, but I just can't be bothered to cook any more.
textByHashes.9977b89e1daa9e230b373b38704580c92c95bad3: Why should I pay Window Tax when I don't want any windows. I'd be more than happy staring at the blank walls. How much money are we supposed to pay?
textByHashes.c28db2f97012ad9aa499062501c8cea3107edb7b: What? Can't you count? I'm not paying my tax to someone who can't count.
textByHashes.4917df870e90a085be7165094da965196eceb2fc: That's not right. I'm not paying you that much!
textByHashes.752e7a079bce784be178a5412edba1384da25063: It seems a lot of money for some windows.
textByHashes.ed17cdaa90db5cf0b852c84981c4cbcba20fc4c6: I cannot take any more of this! What ridiculous thing is worthy of taxation this time?
textByHashes.72354e17bb70b065cbcab1fb2102d22c4990412a: But I don't have a beard, I have a finely waxed moustache. I'm definitely not beardy at all.
textByHashes.22b1f796337ad9e8e62e745d03481f11d6aed0f6: Surely, facial hair should be taxed on percentage of the face covered. In which case I should owe no more than 20% of the tax that wild-bearded Fremennik men pay.
textByHashes.e4d966bc80fe2185fddebdda7657e12238182a57: My faith in humanity has been sapped again. Thanks for that. Here take the money and get out of my sight.
textByHashes.a6d569907e15fe59dbb88219d9b1208b91426f22: You should speak with the ruler of this isle, King Gjuki Sorvott IV.
textByHashes.e1c522d0228eb8bebf04180fb6ea45fbc909f894: Go away and let me wallow in self loathing.
